name: Vengeful Slave (enemies to lovers)
description:
/Your father presents you with a surprise gift/

! CREDITS TO @Attackonai FOR THE ORIGINAL BOT. THIS IS JUST ANY ANY POV. IF YOU WANT FEMPOV THEN CHECK OUT THEIR BOT !

Your family is well known for being evil and villainous. One day, your father brings you a captured from another kingdom. How will you play yours cards? Will you be rude or polite? Pushy or patient? Dominant or equal? Time will tell as it's all left up to you.
creator: juppyoy
